query:
-- Governance audit log: every lifecycle action appends one row
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS governance_audit_log (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  claim_id VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,
  tenant_id VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,
  action VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,
  performed_by VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,
  performed_by_name VARCHAR(200),
  timestamp_ms BIGINT NOT NULL,
  reason TEXT NOT NULL,
  override_flag TINYINT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  ai_decision VARCHAR(100),
  human_decision VARCHAR(100),
  action_allowed TINYINT NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
  validation_errors_json TEXT,
  metadata_json TEXT,
  INDEX idx_gal_claim (claim_id),
  INDEX idx_gal_tenant (tenant_id),
  INDEX idx_gal_action (action),
  INDEX idx_gal_timestamp (timestamp_ms),
  INDEX idx_gal_override (override_flag)
);

-- Add governance columns to claim_decision_lifecycle
ALTER TABLE claim_decision_lifecycle
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS reviewed_reason TEXT,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS finalised_reason TEXT,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS locked_reason TEXT,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS override_flag TINYINT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS ai_decision VARCHAR(100),
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS human_decision VARCHAR(100),
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS override_reason TEXT;

  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS override_reason TEXT;
